texto: It makes no sense to compare yourself with others because there will always be better & worse people than you out there. Each person has his own path to make. You are where you are now. The choice is yours...

texto: I remember a time in a class on a cold winter morning a Japanese girl came with a surgical mask & I thought “wow people would go to extremes NOT to get sick in Japan” afterwards on a break I approached her & asked in a cynical manner: why the mask? Are you afraid of catching a cold? & then she said “in Japan you use it when YOU are under the weather & you don’t want other people to get sick, it is the polite thing to do” wow! that's a lesson I will never forget

frase_original: I remember a time in a class on a cold winter morning a Japanese girl came with a surgical mask & I thought “wow people would go to extremes NOT to get sick in Japan” afterwards on a break I approached her & asked in a cynical manner: why the mask? Are you afraid of catching a cold? & then she said “in Japan you use it when YOU are under the weather & you don’t want other people to get sick, it is the polite thing to do” wow! that's a lesson I will never forget

texto: There is a story I always tell my students...when I came for the 1st time to the US. I didn’t speak English (Only Spanish) & I saw on every door the word “exit” which in Spanish means Success = Exito. And then I said :”No wonder Americans are winners ,every door they open leads to success
explicacao: Citação de Pablo sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “There is a story I always tell my students...when I came for the 1st time to the US. I didn’t spe…” articula humor, america, americans em registro de humor, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e americans.

I didn’t speak English (Only Spanish) & I saw on every door the word “exit” which in Spanish means Success = Exito. And then I said :”No wonder Americans are winners ,every door they open leads to success

texto: Somedays you're the cue ball, somedays you are the eight ball
explicacao: Citação de Pablo sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “Somedays you're the cue ball, somedays you are the eight ball” articula motivacao, cause-and-effect, consequences em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e consequences.
